_meta: Smoke fixture for incident-postmortem. Requires args.incidentDate + args.summary.

args.summary: checkout endpoint 502 spike for 18 minutes after deploy 7a2c4f

RCA_SCHEMA.rootCause: Stripe client init moved to module-top scope; missing env var on canary instance
contributingFactors: Canary instance not in env-var sync list
No startup health check that validates external clients
whyChain: Checkout returned 502 → Stripe client threw on init → env var STRIPE_KEY undefined on canary → canary missed from env sync list → no automated env-var diff in deploy pipeline → process gap
